languages.text: "Долго целишься! Погонщица тебя ждать не будет".

traits.locale_text: "Долго целишься! Погонщица тебя ждать не будет".

languages.text: "You're taking way too long to aim! The Drover won't wait."
languages.original_text: "Долго целишься! Погонщица тебя ждать не будет".

traits.locale_text: "You're taking way too long to aim! The Drover won't wait."
"You're taking way too long to aim! The Drover won't wait."
"You're taking way too long to aim! The Drover won't wait."
"You're taking way too long to aim! The Drover won't wait."

languages.text: “你瞄得也太久了！拒生花可没耐心等你。”
languages.original_text: "You're taking way too long to aim! The Drover won't wait."

traits.locale_text: “你瞄得也太久了！拒生花可没耐心等你。”

languages.text: «¡Tardas mucho en apuntar! El Pastor no va a esperar».
languages.original_text: "You're taking way too long to aim! The Drover won't wait."

traits.locale_text: «¡Tardas mucho en apuntar! El Pastor no va a esperar».

languages.text: « Tu mets trop de temps à ajuster la visée ! Le Chasseur ne t'attendra pas. »
languages.original_text: "You're taking way too long to aim! The Drover won't wait."

traits.locale_text: « Tu mets trop de temps à ajuster la visée ! Le Chasseur ne t'attendra pas. »

languages.text: "Nişan alıp ateş etmen çok uzun sürüyor! Çoban beklemez."
languages.original_text: "You're taking way too long to aim! The Drover won't wait."

traits.locale_text: "Nişan alıp ateş etmen çok uzun sürüyor! Çoban beklemez."

languages.text: "Du brauchst viel zu lange zum Zielen! Der Treiber wird nicht warten."
languages.original_text: "You're taking way too long to aim! The Drover won't wait."

traits.locale_text: "Du brauchst viel zu lange zum Zielen! Der Treiber wird nicht warten."

languages.text: 「狙うのに時間をかけすぎだ！ ドローヴァーは待っちゃくれんぞ」
languages.original_text: "You're taking way too long to aim! The Drover won't wait."

traits.locale_text: 「狙うのに時間をかけすぎだ！ ドローヴァーは待っちゃくれんぞ」
